research_question: What is the comparative clinical efficacy and adverse event rates of skeletal muscle relaxants compared to other relaxants, placebo, or specific antispasticity agents in adult patients with spasticity or musculoskeletal conditions?

comparison.name: Comparison
exclude: different analgesic medication in comparison arm (unless same analgesic same dose)
historical controls without concurrent control group
different drug classes without muscle relaxant properties
combinations with analgesics unless both arms have same analgesic
